blocks.text:
Key learnings: **118127 Iran (2nd pick, +0.23)** and **80352 DHS (+0.59)** gave big positives — recalibration works for future days. But 666021/783773 (both **UAE**, not Ethiopia) still scored -40 to -43 because early high-confidence days on Ethiopia locked in losses *before* I recalibrated — late recalibration can't undo past TW weight.

Critical patterns: **Syria rebel groups = PKK** (both 138247 & 756891), **Somalia antagonist = UAE** (both Somalia questions). The 3 resolving tomorrow (117844, 359260, 98159) are already modest spreads. Cum TW -523.66. Let me log and advance.

input.command:
cd "/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_glm52_r00/26-06-14-19-17-03/agents/minimalHarness_glm-52[1m]_001/workspace"
cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## Day 20: 2026-01-11
- Positives: 118127 BRICS=Iran (had 2nd, +0.23), 80352 cabinet=DHS (+0.59!). Recalibration WORKS going forward.
- BUT 666021/783773 = UAE (not Ethiopia): TW -43/-41 because EARLY days locked high-Ethiopia losses before I recalibrated. Late recalib can't undo past weight.
### SOLID PATTERNS (apply to remaining similar Qs):
- Syria rebel/reinforcement groups = PKK (138247 & 756891 both PKK).
- Somalia antagonist = UAE (both Somalia Qs = UAE, not Ethiopia).
- Qatar = recurring mediator/location.
- Man Utd caretaker = Michael Carrick (474377).
- Cum TW -523.66 over 41 Qs.
- 3 resolve Jan 12: 117844, 359260, 98159 (all modest spreads, no churn).
EOF
echo done
